title: dryopteris affinis subsp. pontica
intro: Dryopteris affinis subsp. pontica, also known as the buckler fern, is a subspecies of the Dryopteris affinis fern species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of this plant include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Dryopteris affinis subsp. pontica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
